🇵🇭 Philippines Pulse

BGC, Makati & Metro Manila trends, local news and updates

INQUIRER.net Apr 6, 09:45 AM

Power grid in Cebu stable following Bogo earthquake — NGCP

LAPU-LAPU CITY, Cebu — Power transmission services in Cebu remained stable after a magnitude 5.1 earthquake struck off Bogo City on Monday afternoon, April 6. “The grid remains intact as there had been no reported cases of power interruptions and damaged transmission facilities in Cebu Province and nearby areas where the earthquake was felt,” the National Grid Corporation of the Philippines (NGCP) said in an advisory. The Philippine Institute of Volcanology and Seismology (Phivolcs) reported that the tremor occurred at around 3:22 p.m., about 12 kilometers southeast of Bogo City. READ: Magnitude 5.4 earthquake rocks City of Bogo, Cebu on […]... Keep on reading: Power grid in Cebu stable following Bogo earthquake — NGCP

INQUIRER.net Apr 6, 09:30 AM

Capuloy, Bacaro lose in Japan bouts

CEBU CITY, Philippines — Rhonvex Capuloy and Carlo Bacaro came up short in their respective bouts held at the Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan, on Saturday, April 4. Capuloy, fighting out of the Cebu-based Big Yellow Boxing Gym, absorbed a unanimous decision loss to former world champion Kenichi Ogawa, while Bacaro suffered a ninth-round technical […]... Keep on reading: Capuloy, Bacaro lose in Japan bouts

Variety Apr 6, 08:05 AM

Ranveer Singh’s ‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ Crosses $174 Million Globally, Becomes First Indian Film to Top $25 Million in North America

Jio Studios and B62 Studios’ “Dhurandhar: The Revenge” has crossed INR1,622 crores ($174.4 million) worldwide through its third weekend, becoming the first Indian film to surpass $25 million in North America and €1 million ($1.1 million) in Germany. The Aditya Dhar-directed spy-action sequel’s India gross stands at $132.1 million. In Germany, the film established itself […]

Variety Apr 6, 07:44 AM

Korea Box Office: ‘Project Hail Mary’ Ascends to No. 1 Dethroning ‘The King’s Warden’

“Project Hail Mary” rose to the top position at the South Korean box office during the weekend of Apr. 3–05, 2026. According to data from KOBIS, the tracking service operated by the Korean Film Council, the film earned $2.4 million from 328,750 admissions, capturing a 39.56% revenue share. Since its Mar. 18 debut, the film, […]

Variety Apr 6, 07:04 AM

China Box Office: ‘The Super Mario Galaxy Movie’ Launches to Top Spot

Universal’s “The Super Mario Galaxy Movie” blasted into first place at the China box office during the April 3–5 weekend, according to data from Artisan Gateway, earning RMB57.1 million ($8.3 million) in its debut frame. China Film’s drama “It’s OK,” after debuting in fifth place with previews last week, opened on April 3 and climbed […]

Paramount Skydance seems to be nearing a deal to secure funding from three Gulf nation sovereign wealth funds to back its proposed acquisition of Warner Bros. Deadline Apr 5, 11:17 PM

UCLA Triumphs Over South Carolina For First-Ever NCAA Women’s Basketball Title

The UCLA Bruins have made history by clinching their first-ever NCAA Women’s Basketball championship after dominating the South Carolina Gamecocks 79-51 at the Mortgage Matchup Center in Phoenix, Ariz. earlier today. While the Big Ten Conference team had never won the title since the student athletics organization adopted women’s basketball as an official sport in […]
